title: Invalid email address error in Gmail node
symptom: The Gmail node throws 'Invalid email address (item 0)' when using an email address from the AI agent. Manually entered email addresses work fine.
applies_when: Email address is dynamically generated from AI agent
not_this_if: Email address is manually entered and valid
root_cause: The Gmail node requires the 'To' field to be set as an Expression to properly interpret dynamic values. If set to Fixed, it does not evaluate the expression, leading to the invalid email error.
fix_steps: Change the 'To' field from Fixed to Expression
Ensure the email address is correctly referenced from the AI agent
Save the workflow and test again
agent_instruction: Change the 'To' field in the Gmail node to use Expression instead of Fixed.
